name: 20"x30" Avery Plaid Handloom Woven Bath Rug Ivory/Green - Threshold™
description:
Elevate your bathroom decor with this Avery Plaid Handloom Woven Bath Rug from Threshold™. Featuring an ivory and green plaid pattern, this handmade rug brings warmth, texture and a touch of artisanal character to your space. Crafted from 100% cotton, it provides a soft, absorbent surface that feels comfortable underfoot. Designed with a flat pile height and no backing, the rug is also easy to clean.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
